title: Bee Removal in University Heights, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in University Heights, Bronx. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service!
intro: University Heights residents dealing with bee infestations need prompt, professional assistance to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC offers specialized bee removal services throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood, ensuring safe and humane extraction of colonies from homes, apartment buildings, and commercial properties. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of University Heights architecture and provide effective solutions at competitive rates.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving University Heights for years with licensed, insured technicians who prioritize safe, eco-friendly bee removal methods. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing between $350-$550, and guarantee complete colony removal without damage to your property.
localContext: University Heights' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, historic brownstones near Hall of Fame Terrace, and proximity to Bronx Community College creates numerous spaces where bees can establish hives in walls, rooflines, and chimneys. The tree-lined streets and green spaces near University Woods attract pollinators, making professional bee removal services essential for both residential buildings along Fordham Road and commercial properties throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in University Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to University Heights residents. During peak bee season (spring and summer), we prioritize emergency calls where bees pose immediate threats to children, pets, or individuals with allergies. Most University Heights locations can be reached within 2-4 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 price include for bee removal?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes complete inspection, safe bee colony removal, nest extraction, treatment of the affected area, and prevention recommendations. The final cost depends on colony size, location accessibility (roof, wall cavity, chimney), and whether structural repairs are needed. We provide free estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we partner with local beekeepers to relocate honeybee colonies safely, preserving these important pollinators. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted treatments that minimize environmental impact. We'll discuss the best approach for your specific situation during our inspection.

faqs.question: Can bees damage my University Heights apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Yes, established bee colonies can cause significant damage over time. Honeycomb can attract other pests, create moisture problems leading to mold, and even cause structural damage if left untreated. In University Heights' older buildings, bees often enter through small gaps in brick mortar or roof trim, and the colony can expand rapidly within wall cavities.
